meaning: n.卢瑟福(英国物理学家,化学家)
examples: Rutherford, who I have already described to you as being a little bit colorful in his language, backed up Bohr on this.
After his victory, Rutherford took a victory lap around the stadium that outlasted the 10, 000 meters.
Rutherford would not confirm if any of Southwest's recent flights into Buffalo experienced problems on approach.
